label: Curve-key animation part
description: A per-node animation part driven by AnimationCurve data. Offset, angle, and scale channels each use a ComplexCurve or Vector3Curve. Graphic state switches are defined by CurveKey keyframes. Default worker is AnimationWorker_Curves.

keyframes.label: Graphic state keyframes
keyframes.description: CurveKey entries that switch the node's graphic state at a given tick.

normalized.label: Normalized
normalized.description: If true, the curve is evaluated using a normalized time in the range 0..1 over the animation's durationTicks. If false, raw ticks are used. Default is true.

offset.label: Offset curve
offset.description: Position offset animation as three ComplexCurves (x, y, z).

angle.label: Angle curve
angle.description: Rotation angle animation as a ComplexCurve.

scale.label: Scale curve
scale.description: Scale animation as three ComplexCurves (x, y, z).
